title: A.O. Smith Corporation (AOS) CEO Kevin Wheeler on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: A.O. Smith Corporation (AOS) CEO Kevin Wheeler on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: A O Smith Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Registers 19% Sales Growth
text: A O Smith Corp (NYSE: AOS) reported fourth-quarter net sales growth of 19% year-over-year to $995.5 million, beating the consensus of $962.3 million. EPS improved 18% Y/Y to $0.87, beating the consensus of $0.77.

title: A. O. Smith (AOS) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates
text: A. O. Smith's (AOS) fourth-quarter 2021 revenues increase 19.3% year over year on account of impressive performance across its segments.

title: A.O. Smith (AOS) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: A.O. Smith (AOS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 12.99% and 3.09%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: A. O. Smith Stock: Growth In Residential Construction A Key Catalyst
text: AOS has a wide economic moat, especially after its acquisition of Giant Factories, which we see benefiting the company as growth in residential construction continues in the coming years. AOS revenues were up 20% Y/Y, with Chinese sales up 19% Y/Y.

title: A. O. Smith to Hold Fourth Quarter Conference Call on January 27, 2022
